mission.title: oras: Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an option to format output as JSON
mission.description: Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an option to format output as JSON. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current oras deployment
steps.description:
Verify your oras version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras
helm list -n oras 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working oras installation.

steps.title: Review oras configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant oras configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras
kubectl get configmap -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oras
```
### What is the version of your ORAS CLI

Version:        0.15.0 Go version:     go1.19 Git commit:     94abaecb072d7c44bf484cb7070db2c94be2a028 Git tree state: clean

### What would you like to be added?

An option to format output for commands

steps.title: Apply the fix for Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an…
steps.description:
>  are you open to removing the http(s) part for the reference field?

 Sounds good if it helps automation.

```
oras attach myreg.azurecr.io/my/repo:tag \
      --artifact-type "example/foo" logo.jpg:image/jpg \
      -o json  \
| jq .reference | xargs -n1 oras manifest fetch --output
```yaml
{
  "referrers": [
    {
      "digest": "sha256:someHash",
      "mediaType": "someType",
      "artifactType": "someArtifactType",
      "reference" : "<myacr>.azurecr.io/my/repo@sha256:someHash",
      "size": sizeInBytes
    },
  ]
}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras
kubectl get events -n oras --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Oras commands like attach, discover, and pull support  an…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
>  are you open to removing the http(s) part for the reference field?

 Sounds good if it helps automation.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with oras installed or the issue environment reproducible.
